scripts.docker:hosted:smoke:probes: python3 -c "import json, os, urllib.request; api_port=os.environ.get('CCDASH_API_PORT','8000'); worker_port=os.environ.get('CCDASH_WORKER_PROBE_PORT','9465'); frontend_port=os.environ.get('CCDASH_FRONTEND_PORT','3000'); api_ready=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(f'http://127.0.0.1:{api_port}/api/health/ready', timeout=5)); api_detail=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(f'http://127.0.0.1:{api_port}/api/health/detail', timeout=5)); worker_ready=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(f'http://127.0.0.1:{worker_port}/readyz', timeout=5)); worker_detail=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(f'http://127.0.0.1:{worker_port}/detailz', timeout=5)); frontend_status=urllib.request.urlopen(f'http://127.0.0.1:{frontend_port}/', timeout=5).status; assert api_ready.get('ready') is True, api_ready; assert api_detail.get('profile') == 'api', api_detail; assert api_detail.get('migrationStatus') == 'applied', api_detail; assert api_detail.get('jobsEnabled') is False, api_detail; assert worker_ready.get('ready', {}).get('ready') is True, worker_ready; assert worker_detail.get('runtimeProfile') == 'worker', worker_detail; assert worker_detail.get('detail', {}).get('worker', {}).get('projectId'), worker_detail; assert frontend_status == 200, frontend_status; print(json.dumps({'api_ready': api_ready, 'api_detail_subset': {'profile': api_detail.get('profile'), 'migrationStatus': api_detail.get('migrationStatus'), 'jobsEnabled': api_detail.get('jobsEnabled')}, 'worker_ready': worker_ready, 'worker_detail_subset': {'runtimeProfile': worker_detail.get('runtimeProfile'), 'projectId': worker_detail.get('detail', {}).get('worker', {}).get('projectId')}, 'frontend_status': frontend_status}, indent=2))"
scripts.docker:hosted:smoke:job: python3 -c "import json, os, urllib.request; base=f\"http://127.0.0.1:{os.environ.get('CCDASH_API_PORT','8000')}\"; settings_req=urllib.request.Request(f'{base}/api/telemetry/export/settings', data=json.dumps({'enabled': True}).encode(), headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, method='PATCH'); settings=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(settings_req, timeout=5)); push_req=urllib.request.Request(f'{base}/api/telemetry/export/push-now', data=b'', method='POST'); push=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(push_req, timeout=5)); assert settings.get('configured') is True, settings; assert settings.get('envLocked') is False, settings; assert push.get('success') is True, push; print(json.dumps({'settings': settings, 'push_now': push}, indent=2))"
scripts.docker:hosted:smoke:cli-contract: docker compose --env-file deploy/runtime/compose.hosted.env.example -f deploy/runtime/compose.hosted.yml exec -T api python -m pytest backend/tests/test_cli_commands.py -q
scripts.docker:hosted:smoke:mcp-contract: docker compose --env-file deploy/runtime/compose.hosted.env.example -f deploy/runtime/compose.hosted.yml exec -T api python -m pytest backend/tests/test_mcp_server.py -q
scripts.docker:hosted:smoke:validate: npm run docker:hosted:smoke:config && npm run docker:hosted:smoke:up && npm run docker:hosted:smoke:ps && npm run docker:hosted:smoke:probes && npm run docker:hosted:smoke:job && npm run docker:hosted:smoke:cli-contract && npm run docker:hosted:smoke:mcp-contract
